title: Case Study: Building Water Through Balanced Reaction
scenario: A scientist needs to create water for a life-support experiment. Use the correct elements and proper quantities to produce water.
objectives: Select the correct elements for H2O
Use the correct 2:1 ratio of Hydrogen to Oxygen
Combine them in the reaction zone
reflectionQuestions: Which elements are needed to form water?
What happens if the wrong element is added?
What does the equation H2O tell us about the structure of water?
